strand3_regulation.regulation_baseline:
Known regulatory state as of 2026-05-11:
- PIPA (개인정보보호법) 개정: effective 2026-09-15. Key impact: automated decision-making must be disclosed;
  sensitive personal data handling requires explicit consent; increased fines up to 3% of global revenue.
  Service A monetized as PIPA Tier P SKU (3M one-shot + 500K/mo monitoring).
- 식약처 화장품 광고 가이드라인: prohibits clinical efficacy claims without substantiation;
  prohibits before/after images unless clinical trial backed; 피부과 테스트 완료 requires certification.
  Service V (AI video ads) and Service W (advertorial landing pages) must lint against these rules.
- AI Basic Act Korea (AI 기본법): passed 2024, enforcement phased in 2025-2026.
  High-risk AI systems require conformity assessment. Current status unclear for marketing AI.
- 표시광고법: general false advertising rules apply to all services.
queries: AI Basic Act Korea enforcement 2026 AI 기본법

strand5_internal_drift.decisions:
# Decision Log

Append-only. When a meaningful decision is made, log it here.

Format: [YYYY-MM-DD] DECISION: ... | REASONING: ... | CONTEXT: ...

[2026-05-06] DECISION: Speed-to-Lead MVP uses Flask + ngrok, NOT Trigger.dev, for first client demos | REASONING: Trigger.dev $50/mo subscription not yet purchased; Flask server (speed_to_lead.py) is production-ready and passes 6/6 tests — no need to block demo path on subscription. Trigger.dev becomes relevant only after 3+ paying clients. | CONTEXT: Service 2 AI 자동화 end-to-end build session

[2026-05-06] DECISION: Speed-to-Lead Notion log DB is separate from Clients CRM DB | REASONING: Existing Notion DB (41672825...) is the Clients CRM (pipeline tracking). Speed-to-Lead needs a separate log DB for per-inquiry records (고객ID, 문의내용, 카테고리, Eval점수 etc). Created new DB: 1584294713e84016aed7a81930b83630. | CONTEXT: Discovered during session when fetching the Clients DB schema

[2026-05-06] DECISION: Production server = Naver Cloud Platform, NOT Oracle Cloud | REASONING: Oracle Cloud is barely used in Korean market; NCP is the Korean standard (한국어 지원, Korean data sovereignty, familiar to Korean clients), free for 1 year micro tier then ₩11,000/월. Oracle signup was started but dropped. | CONTEXT: User questioned why Oracle was recommended; Korean market context surfaced NCP as better fit

[2026-05-06] DECISION: Trigger.dev fully dropped; automation backbone = Make.com (first client) → n8n self-hosted (3+ clients) | REASONING: User confirmed they will use Make.com or n8n. Make.com is faster to set up for first demo; n8n on NCP VM is the production path. Trigger.dev $50/mo subscription never needed. | CONTEXT: Service 2 automation stack finalized during action plan session

[2026-05-06] DECISION: ngrok is the only server needed for MVP demo phase | REASONING: Flask server runs locally, ngrok provides public URL for KakaoTalk webhook — no cloud VM needed until first paying client is signed. Avoids Oracle/NCP setup overhead before revenue exists. | CONTEXT: User challenged Oracle Cloud necessity mid-signup

[2026-05-06] DECISION: 사업자등록 not needed to build or demo the automation system — only needed for KakaoTalk Channel API production activation | REASONING: Building + ngrok testing requires zero business registration. KakaoTalk API requires 사업자등록증 only for the "API 메시지" activation step. 영범's existing 사업자 covers this for first clients. | CONTEXT: User asked "자동화 시스템 만드는데 왜 사업자등록을 해야하지?"

[2026-05-07] DECISION: Speed-to-Lead MVP confirmed end-to-end working; only KakaoTalk creds remain blocking real client deployment | REASONING: Flask server + Haiku triage (95% confidence) + Sonnet Korean reply + Notion log persistence (7 rows, integration shared) all verified in one session. AI reply quality is brand-appropriate, pulls from FAQ + product catalog correctly. Every reply currently escalates because Kakao send fails, but that path is ready the moment a real client provides kakao_access_token + kakao_channel_id. | CONTEXT: Demo session — no remaining engineering work for the wedge phase; next blocker is 영업 (cold DM → onboarding), not code.

---

[2026-04-24] DECISION: First Mover AI daily digest Routine pushed to GitHub and ready to register | REASONING: Routine prompt runs on Anthropic servers at 07:07 KST — no PC required. Bug fixed: git commands now run from repo root (not projects/youtube-biz subdirectory). Single action remaining: user registers at claude.ai/code/routines. | CONTEXT: Automation goal is PC-off daily newsletter to claude/newsletter-YYYY-MM-DD branch.
[2026-04-27] DECISION: YouTube biz restructured from single brand to 3-surface model (First Mover AI IG/YT, Politics YT, Sing It Partnership — both English channels) | REASONING: Original "First Mover AI" single-brand assumption was wrong; 영범 confirmed both 영어-singit and 영어노래 are under Sing It partnership; each surface has distinct revenue logic, brand, and ownership split | CONTEXT: Partner collaboration planning session; resulted in GSD build spanning 4 plans.
[2026-04-28] DECISION: Discord bot switched from Gemini to Groq (llama-3.3-70b-versatile) | REASONING: Gemini free quota exhausted (1,500/day shared with MCP server); Groq gives 14,400 free req/day on a separate quota pool, no credit card needed | CONTEXT: kh-yb-shared Discord bot for legoat #도움말 channel.
[2026-04-28] DECISION: kh-yb-shared repo created as shared workflow repo with legoat (영범) for 1stmover.ai content pipeline | REASONING: Separate from MCP_Agentic_AI repo to give 영범 a clean entry point; contains scrapers, Korean docs, content.md template, used-topics ledger, dedup Discord notifier | CONTEXT: End-of-session packaging of today's X scraping + content workflow.
[2026-04-28] DECISION: /1stmover skill created as entry point for daily IG content workflow | REASONING: Single slash command handles: read ledger → keyword + account discovery (12-24h KST window) → filter used → download media → write content.md → update ledger → Discord notify. No automation yet — manual invocation only. | CONTEXT: legoat onboarded to kh-yb-shared; routine registration deferred to future.
[2026-04-28] DECISION: 영범 nickname set to "legoat" going forward | REASONING: User preference stated explicitly 2026-04-28 | CONTEXT: Sending legoat the step-by-step Korean guide via Discord.
[2026-04-27] DECISION: Instagrapi quarantined permanently; 14-day IG cool-down until 2026-05-10 | REASONING: Meta sent automation-suspicion warning; competitor scraper ran 5-account Instagrapi scrape on 2026-04-22 from main account; session cache confirmed active login | CONTEXT: IG launch set for tomorrow (manual only); resume automation via official Graph API after cool-down.

strand5_internal_drift.lessons:
# Lessons — Self-Improvement Log

After any correction, mistake, or pattern worth remembering, append here.
Claude reads this at session start to avoid repeating the same errors.

Format: `[YYYY-MM-DD] MISTAKE/PATTERN: ... | FIX: ... | RULE: ...`

---

[2026-03-09] MISTAKE: Tried to Write a file without reading it first, causing tool error. | FIX: Always Read before Write or Edit. | RULE: Read → Edit/Write. Never Write cold.

[2026-03-09] MISTAKE: Put Korean characters (바탕 화면) directly in a JSON hook command string — caused encoding fragility. | FIX: Extract the logic to a .py helper script and call the script path instead. | RULE: Never embed multi-byte paths in inline JSON strings. Use a script file.

[2026-03-09] MISTAKE: Attributed ChromaDB failure to "MCP compatibility" in mock interview context. | FIX: Correct explanation is Python 3.14 + Pydantic v1 runtime type inference issue. | RULE: ChromaDB fails on Python 3.14 due to Pydantic v1, not MCP. State this precisely.

[2026-03-09] PATTERN: Wispr Flow voice-to-text causes phonetic typos in Korean/English tech terms (e.g. "link chain" → LangChain). | RULE: Interpret tech term typos charitably. Always confirm before correcting.

[2026-03-09] PATTERN: User prefers to keep moving — flag human-in-loop blockers and skip, don't stop. | RULE: Note blocked items in a queue, continue to next task automatically.

[2026-03-12] CORRECTION: "Cover letters" do not exist in Korean job applications. The correct format is 자기소개서 (자소서) — structured responses to company-specific prompts (지원동기, 성장과정, 직무 경험, 장단점 etc.). What was created in `projects/next-ai-role/cover-letter-*.md` are 자소서 narrative drafts, not ready-to-submit documents. Each company's actual 자소서 questions must be pulled from their application portal first, then the narrative content mapped to those prompts.

[2026-04-06] PATTERN: Build mode vs Ship mode. Built 5+ projects to production-ready state but contacted zero clients. The system is optimized for building, not selling. | FIX: Every session should include at least one go-to-market action (draft DM, post listing, run audit on real target). | RULE: "Built" is not "shipped." A project without a client conversation is a hobby project.

[2026-04-06] PATTERN: Dormant capabilities accumulate. 8 skills, 2 agents, 5 commands, 6 cron schedules — all built but never invoked. | FIX: Audit utilization quarterly. If a capability hasn't been used in 30 days, either use it or archive it. | RULE: Don't build more tools until existing ones are being used.

[2026-04-06] PATTERN: Lessons.md itself went stale (3 entries in 4 weeks). Self-improvement loops only work if they run. | FIX: Added /daily-learn to session-end SOP. | RULE: The meta-habit (logging lessons) matters more than any individual lesson.

[2026-04-22] MISTAKE: Used `dangerouslyDisableSandbox: true` on rm commands, which triggers stricter approval and gets auto-denied even when `Bash(rm:*)` is in the allowlist. | FIX: Drop `dangerouslyDisableSandbox` — rm is already allowed. If still blocked, ask user to delete manually. | RULE: Never use dangerouslyDisableSandbox for file deletion. It makes things worse, not better.

[2026-05-07] PATTERN: Notion integration access (sharing a DB/page with an integration) cannot be granted via API — it's a security boundary requiring manual UI action ("..." → Connections → Add). Both notion-client SDK and Notion MCP lack this endpoint. | FIX: When a server-side Notion write returns 404 "make sure the page is shared with your integration", open the DB in the browser and have the user add the integration manually. Don't hunt for an API workaround. | RULE: Every new Notion DB used by a Python integration needs a one-time manual share. Bake this into onboarding runbooks.

[2026-05-07] PATTERN: Windows cp949 default codec breaks any Python script that prints Korean (em dash, hangul, JSON-decoded Notion titles). | FIX: Add `import sys; sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8')` as the first line of any i
...[truncated]

strand5_internal_drift.priorities:
# Current Priorities

_Last updated: 2026-05-10 — Sing It dropped, AI agency is sole revenue priority. Service V and A first, W deprioritized._

---

## 1. AI Agency — Sole Revenue Priority

Three services. Order is V and A first, W deprioritized as of 2026-05-09 per Keonhee. 영범 is lead-sourcing partner.

| Service | Status | Pricing |
|---|---|---|
| **V** — AI 영상 광고 (Higgsfield Pro / Veo 3 / ElevenLabs v3 / Suno Pro / Claude Sonnet) | Stack signup pending (A1 blocker) | ₩1.5M flat first 5, then tier menu up to ₩3M / retainer ₩2.5-5M/mo |
| **A** — AI 자동화 (Speed-to-Lead Flask + Make.com → n8n on NCP) | Wedge demo built, sales not started | ₩500K setup + ₩200K/월 (PIPA Tier P ₩3M + ₩500K/월) |
| **W** — AI 웹사이트 (Claude Design + Next.js 15 + Vercel) | Phase A 5 tasks not started | ₩500K-1.5M/건 |

4. **V stack API keys** — Higgsfield Pro, ElevenLabs v3, Veo 3, Suno Pro. Required for V Phase A1.
5. **모두의창업 2026 application** — submit Q1-Q9, deadline 2026.05.15 16:00 (D-5 from today).

### W Phase A (5 tasks, on hold while V/A move first)

- [A1] Next.js 15 template repo (Korean SEO + llms.txt + JSON-LD + cosmetics-ad-lint + medical-ad-lint + lighthouse-ci)
- [A2] /web-brief skill (intake → advertorial brief)
